message:
test(onboard): add 31 integration tests for onboardCommand

Coverage improvement: src/commands/onboard.ts 2.27% → 67.83%

Tests cover:
- Input validation (limit, days, workspace, agent, read, mark-done)
- --reset subcommand (with/without --yes confirmation)
- --mark-done subcommand
- --status subcommand (JSON and text modes)
- --gaps subcommand (JSON and text modes)
- --sample subcommand (including fill-gaps mode)
- --read subcommand (including --template mode)
- --prompt subcommand
- Default guided mode

Part of sdt1.4.2 coverage burn-down.
